selection_policy: Prefer tasks that improve legibility, self-description, routing clarity, and bounded runtime continuity before expanding authority.

recommended.summary: Link the human-readable OpenClaw runtime profile to machine-readable self-state files so the runtime can orient through both forms.
Extend runtime/memory/nav/Runtime-Navigation-Folder-Guide.md with a formal self-orientation contract so runtimes can expose identity, capabilities, posture, and valid next actions consistently.
Evolve seeded nav-map routes into evidence-backed runtime route records tied to observed runs, writebacks, and stable operator paths.

explicitly_not_next.reason: Useful, but it expands an adjacent governance layer before the runtime can cleanly describe itself from structured state.
